nodes.label: Fluffle payment + hour-tracking workflow
nodes.rationale: Adithya specced separating API uploads from individual contributor submissions, hour tracking, biweekly bank-transfer invoices, disabling auto-Stripe; Daniel approved Autoboomer-generated PR #133.

nodes.label: Agent Native Strategy / Human API positioning
nodes.rationale: Adithya circulated docs on agent-native solutions positioning, Human API strategy, physical AI / robotics data needs, audio eval app spec, and ElevenLabs offer.

nodes.label: Human API Terms of Service v3.29.26
nodes.rationale: Sydney shared ToS draft, Kayla confirmed legal@thehumanapi.com routes to legal@eclipse.builders; cooley address used as placeholder.

nodes.label: Human API Privacy Policy
nodes.rationale: Kayla shared privacy policy doc dated 2026-03-09.

nodes.label: iOS Human API app launch
nodes.rationale: App Store approved 2026-03-30 (announced by Daniel); v1.1 update approved 2026-04-03 in 16 hours.

nodes.label: Google Play app launch
nodes.rationale: Initial Google Play submission bounced for special reviewer accounts; resubmitted; geo-restriction issues then resolved.

nodes.label: iOS app available in Europe
nodes.rationale: Julien filled out Apple business form; Kayla verified; iOS app available in EU by 2026-04-07.

nodes.label: Microsoft podcast/interview audio deal
nodes.rationale: Sydney announced live deal via Troveo: Microsoft buying podcast-style audio at ~$150/hr, 2-week deadline, ~2-3k hours signed; Adithya offered up to $90 one-time payment to fence-sitting podcasters.

nodes.label: Audio normalization pipeline (lambda)
nodes.rationale: Julien built CLI wrapper + lambda for normalize/SNR/SRR processing; merged 2026-04-09 (PR #166); BM set up audio-normalize lambda infra; speeds 6-15x realtime.

nodes.label: Google Drive upload ingestion pipeline
nodes.rationale: Daniel led gdrive upload support; moved drive-ingest to lambda after server OOMs (PR #203, #235).

nodes.label: boomie-api production OOM crashes
nodes.rationale: BM flagged frequent OOM in API container; Daniel diagnosed audio analysis on server loading huge files; moved to lambda; persisted into 2026-04-21.

nodes.label: Push notification stack failures (P0)
nodes.rationale: Claude triage: 943 events / 383 users = ~85% of error volume; backend timeouts + 404s on /api/push/register; iOS Keychain background-access crashes; tracked in okboomer#213.

nodes.label: Phone verification + OTP issues
nodes.rationale: Cemal led okboomer#197/#203; double-click and autofill OTP issues; rotating short codes from SMS provider; Sydney experienced verification flow bugs.

nodes.label: Sentry triage report (Apr 13)
nodes.rationale: Claude reviewed 33 unresolved Sentry issues, grouped into 5 GitHub issues, classified P0/P1/P2 + 17 noise.

nodes.label: iOS keyboard hangs (P1)
nodes.rationale: okboomer#214: UITextField autoFocus + UIPasteboard pinItemProviders blocking main thread on cold start, 46 events 46 users.

nodes.label: Android fatal SIGABRT on low-end vivo
nodes.rationale: okboomer#216: 9 events 4 users on Android 11 / 4GB RAM vivo devices, native ART runtime.

nodes.label: Boomie.ai to Human API rebrand
nodes.rationale: Daniel: 'boomie will become humanapi'; OTP emails leak Boomie.ai branding causing spam-flag issues.

nodes.label: Task audience targeting + caps
nodes.rationale: ChingHua led prompt caps + audience targeting (email suffix, language, region); admin-only test tasks.

nodes.label: Cursor to Claude Code migration
nodes.rationale: Daniel announced switch from unlimited Cursor to Claude Code to save ~$3900/mo (~10x cheaper per Julien).

nodes.label: Troveo audio spec (uncompressed WAV, 48kHz, LUFS, SNR)
nodes.rationale: Troveo provided advanced metadata spec: uncompressed .wav mono 48kHz+, -27 to -14 LUFS, >50dB SNR, phonetic diversity.

nodes.label: Fluffle audio quality concerns
nodes.rationale: Adithya: 'I can almost guarantee they're scamming us by upsampling low quality audio to 48khz wav files'; Daniel/Veronica B Telegram thread on uncompressed file requests.

nodes.label: Audio Buyers Right Now market overview
nodes.rationale: Adithya circulated complete market overview of who is buying audio and short/medium-term targets.

nodes.label: 2025 Deepgram Voice AI Report
nodes.rationale: Adithya shared Deepgram 2025 Voice AI Report PDF.

nodes.label: Human X Conference leads
nodes.rationale: Adithya shared conference leads spreadsheet.

nodes.label: Auto-release pipeline (release labels)
nodes.rationale: BM set up release-label-triggered production deployment; resolved GITHUB_TOKEN restriction (PR #192).

nodes.label: Podcast host onboarding for Microsoft deal
nodes.rationale: Sydney directed Adithya to close fence-sitting podcast hosts; new podcast signed 2026-04-08; 445 hours added 2026-04-20.

nodes.label: In-app user feedback form proposal
nodes.rationale: VJ proposed in-app feedback modal with image upload + text field; sticky bottom or profile-screen entry.

nodes.label: Recording auto-stops at 1 minute bug
nodes.rationale: Sydney noticed all 200-user task submissions cap at 1 min; Cemal: configurable, raised to 3 hours for next release.

nodes.label: Debug UI buttons leaked to production
nodes.rationale: VJ saw Toggle Loading/Skip-to-Next/Mock-Tasks debug buttons in iOS production; commit ff8e618 root cause; v1.1.20 hotfix submitted (iOS only, Android unaffected).

nodes.label: Save profile details onboarding bug
nodes.rationale: Sydney saw 'Failed to save your details' on iPhone 15 v1.1.17; Cemal: frontend-only issue, profile actually saves to Clerk; okboomer#219.

nodes.label: Read-only Tailscale-restricted prod DB access
nodes.rationale: BM set up boomie_reader DB user with Tailscale restriction for Cemal's debugging.
